title: Faery Alchemy
description: Unleash all your alchemical potential with this mod! Magical stones, blocks and staves await you
body:
Hello Everyone!! This is my first published mod, despite having coded for a while.

Make magic stone using alchemy and use said stones to power blocks and magical items!

## Things to do:
- Colect Astral particles using the Spirit catchers (And enable you to see the spirit leaves particles) and drain the spirit using a vial!
- Make Alchemical Stones that inbue elements of minecraft
- Cast Spells, Do magic and Change your world!!

## Mod Progression:
- Craft Amethyst Crystals into Amethyst Powder
- Craft and place Spirit Catchers around your base
- Colect Spirit Fluid from the Catchers
- Lit a brazier under a Fluid Infuser then Infuse Spirit into Amethyst powder
- Craft a FaeGem
- Polish a FaeGem using 3 Fey Powder on a Arcanum table
- Carve wood and apply the Polished FaeGem into it to make your own staff!!
- Use the Arcanum table to apply spells into the Staff

## Spell Recipes:
### Level 0
- Healing Bolt: Gunpowder, Red Mushroom, Brown Mushroom
- Rotting Bolt: Gunpowder, Rotten Flesh, Bone
- Fire Bolt: Gunpowder, Coal, Blaze Powder
- Ender Bolt: Gunpowder, 2 Chorus Fruit
- Hydro Blast: Gunpowder, Prismarine Crystals, Sea Grass
- Slime Blast: Gunpowder, 2 Slime Balls
  
This mod is inspired by my lore and adventures on season 1 of TSMP! It's still in early alpha, and is currently focoused on the spellcasting part
